GoogleForm.title: Consent to Take Part in Research — Dartmouth College
GoogleForm.description: Digital consent form for participation in the Dartmouth College research study: 'On-Task Objective Method of Cognitive Load Assessment'. Please read all sections carefully and complete required fields.

Question.title: Email Address
Question.Description: Please enter your valid email address.

Question.title: Study Summary
Question.Description:
Study Title: On-Task Objective Method of Cognitive Load Assessment Principal Investigator: Tam Vu, Dartmouth College
You are invited to take part in a study about tracking focus levels using a wearable EEG device (FRENZ Brainband). Participation is voluntary.

Question.title: Purpose and Activities
Question.Description:
Purpose: To determine whether the FRENZ Brainband can measure cognitive load in real time.
You will: - Attend one session (~90–100 minutes) - Wear the FRENZ Brainband - Complete short games and questionnaires - Rate your focus before and after interruptions

Question.title: Risks, Benefits, and Alternatives
Question.Description:
Risks: Mild pressure or irritation from the headband; possible fatigue, boredom, or frustration.
Benefits: Gain insight into focus levels; contribute to focus monitoring tools.
Alternative: You may choose not to participate.

Question.title: Privacy and Confidentiality
Question.Description: Data will be labeled with a unique ID, stored securely, and accessed only by authorized staff. De-identified data may be used for future research.

Question.title: Use of Health Information (HIPAA Notice)
Question.Description: By participating, you allow the research team to use EEG, heart, and motion data for research purposes. Protected by HIPAA and Dartmouth policies.

Question.title: Voluntary Participation
Question.Description: Participation is voluntary. You may stop at any time without penalty or loss of benefits.

Question.title: Compensation
Question.Description: You will receive an Amazon gift card at the end of your session as appreciation.

Question.title: Contacts for Questions
Question.Description: Study questions: Tam.N.Vu@dartmouth.edu Rights questions: CPHS@Dartmouth.edu or (603) 646-6482.

Question.title: Do you consent to take part in this study?
Question.Option: No, I do not consent to participate.

Question.title: Full Name
Question.Description: By typing your name, you affirm that you have read and agree to participate.

Question.title: Age Confirmation
Question.Option: I confirm that I am 18 years of age or older.
